mapper.sql: id, author_user_id as authorUserId, title, content, category, visibility, latitude, longitude, region_name as regionName, image_object_key as imageObjectKey, image_url as imageUrl, image_content_type as imageContentType, status, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, deleted_at as deletedAt
mapper.select: insert into notes (author_user_id, title, content, category, visibility, location, latitude, longitude, region_name, image_object_key, image_url, image_content_type) values (#{authorUserId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{visibility}, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326), #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{regionName}, #{imageObjectKey}, #{imageUrl}, #{imageContentType}) returning

update notes set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, visibility = #{visibility}, location = ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326), latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, region_name = #{regionName}, image_object_key = #{imageObjectKey}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, image_content_type = #{imageContentType}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and author_user_id = #{authorUserId} and status = 'ACTIVE' returning
mapper.update: update notes set status = 'DELETED', updated_at = current_timestamp, deleted_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and author_user_id = #{authorUserId} and status = 'ACTIVE'
